title: Lawless
desc: We control the fear, you understand? Without the fear, we are all good as dead.’ The notorious gangster Al Capone observed that “Prohibition has made nothing but trouble,” and “I am like any other man. All I do is supply a demand.” Acclaimed director delivers a thrillingly vivid slice of American outlaw history in his epic gangster tale, LAWLESS. LAWLESS is the true story of the infamous Bondurant Brothers: three bootlegging siblings who made a run for the American Dream in Prohibition-era Virginia. The film gathers an ensemble of gifted, dynamic new-generation stars – Tom Hardy, Shia LaBeouf, Jessica Chastain, Jason Clarke, Mia Wasikowska, Dane DeHaan – alongside two of the finest actors of their generations, Guy Pearce and Gary Oldman. A riveting, intense story of Crime and Corruption, Loyalty and Love, Brutality and Tenderness, LAWLESS is a rich addition to the American Gangster Canon.

title: Bad Samaritan
desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

title: Aileen Wuornos: American Boogeywoman
desc: True Story that follows America’s most notorious Female Serial killer. Based on Aileen Wuorno’s early life. Back in 1976 a young Aileen arrives in Florida searching for a new life, marries a wealthy yacht club president to start as part of Florida’s high society. Tormented by her inner demons she surrenders to her murderous impulses havoc in the peaceful community.

title: Out Of Death
desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

title: Jurassic Hunt
desc: In this pulse-pounding Creature thriller, Female adventurer Parker joins a crew of male trophy hunters in a remote wilderness park. Their goal: slaughter genetically recreated dinosaurs & must work together to evade the giant human-hungry creatures and mercenaries hired to finish them off. This battle's about to become primitive.

title: Jeepers Creepers 2
desc: Every 23rd spring for 23days, it gets to eat…Stranded on a lonely road, a school bus full of high school players must defend themselves from the Creeper, the winged, flesh-eating terror - ancient beast that resurfaces on the earth every 23 years to feed.
